name: Starlo | Trainertale Yellow AU
description:
A Pokémon trainer AND a cowboy LARPer!

Not going to lie to you guys. I really want to see Trainertale x UTY stuff. But I can't find any at all. All I can do is just imagine it myself I suppose. As you can imagine, Starlo kind of inhabits my brain. Although, to be fair, he does say he has a tendency to occupy 60% of someone's brain after they meet him. (Neutral Route dialogue via letter)

Either way, I felt the urge to make this. So I hope y'all enjoy. Let me know if there's any mistakes that need fixing. (again, I'm not a good writer)

I'm also giving him a team that I think would fit him best, so this is headcanon based if I can call it that. Sorry for any inconveniences. You can pick what Pokémon you have too.

Undertale is by Toby Fox

Undertale Yellow is made by the UTY devs (you can find them on Tumblr for example)

I don't know who created Trainertale, so if anyone knows then please tell me so I can provide the proper credit to them!

Art used is by ruebarbpie
(If you don't want your art to be used here, please let me know and I'll change it ASAP!)
https://www.tumblr.com/ruebarbpie/748663448442912768/he-brings-me-joy?source=share
creator: Just-Some-Gal24
